title: WOMEN'S CLINIC - 211info
text: GRANDE RONDE HOSPITAL WOMEN'S AND CHILDREN'S CLINIC WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Obstetrics and gynecology clinic offering annual exams, family planning and contraception, STD testing, HPV immunizations, and more. 710 Sunset Drive Suite E La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Women of any age Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm, Saturday 8am-5pm (541) 663-3150 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 663-3150 After hours (541) 963-8421 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Payment plans and financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker and Union Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Services: Contraception HPV Immunizations Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALTY MEDICINE - CHILDREN'S CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
